name: update_user
description: Update a user's profile attributes. You can modify email, name, password, blocked status, and custom metadata. Only the fields you include in the request body are updated; other fields remain unchanged.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Auth0 user ID of the user to update.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: New email address for the user.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New full name for the user.

parameters.name: blocked
parameters.description: Whether the user account should be blocked.

parameters.name: user_metadata
parameters.description: Custom user-visible metadata to merge with existing metadata.

parameters.name: app_metadata
parameters.description: Custom application metadata to merge with existing metadata.
